name: Ace Trappola // Beach Event 🌺🧉
description:
A summer internship at the Coral Sea’s porthouse Resort, Azure Cove, wouldnt be complete without the medling of your bestfriend. Except—maybe he’s not only there for the warm towels and bottomless pina colodas? ♥️♠️ 

(based on a fake event made by me and some friends. Locations mentioned are completely made up by me.) 

Happy chatting <3
